title: agrostis rubra var. surculifera
intro: Agrostis rubra var. surculifera, also known as the red bentgrass or Surculifera bentgrass, is a variant of the Agrostis rubra species, a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Agrostis rubra var. surculifera include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea, or drying the plant to make a powder for use in capsules or tinctures.
